purpose: Separate semantic proximity from causal relevance before an implementation declares a causal relationship.

steps.name: Identify proximity signal
steps.requirement: Declare whether the relation is lexical, semantic, vector, entity-based, or editorial.

steps.name: Check causal authority
steps.requirement: Require a CCL declaration, reviewed rationale, or source-supported need-state relation before causal wording is allowed.

guardrails: Do not infer latent need from proximity alone.
Do not treat intended consequence as guaranteed outcome.
